violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knife, tongs) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025

The doors to the outside are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2025
Gaskets of the cold drawers are not in good repair, splitting away from the drawer. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice being used in drinks. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
The hand-washing sink at the bar is being used as a dump sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2024
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food/debris and black residue (ice machine). The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener moved to the 3-bay sink to be cleaned and sanitized. Ice machine has been drained and is currently being cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

Chili, which was prepared yesterday, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Chili observed with temperatures 45-67 degrees F. Inspector thermometer calibrated. Voluntary disposal during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Service call was placed. 3-bay sink is to be used to sanitize until dishwasher has correct concentration of chlorine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chili was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Proper cooling methods discussed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the cold drawer refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Thermometers must be present in all refrigeration units to monitor temperatures. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2023
Refrigeration door gaskets of the cold drawers were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door seal. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

The cutting board of the large prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023
